snippets.title: Complete pyproject.toml — setuptools + src layout
snippets.code:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=64", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "ragapp"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "A small retrieval-augmented generation toolkit."
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.10"
license = { text = "MIT" }
authors = [{ name = "Deiva", email = "deiva@example.com" }]
classifiers = [
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
  "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
  "Operating System :: OS Independent",
]
dependencies = [
  "numpy>=1.24",
  "httpx>=0.27",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
  "pytest>=8",
  "pytest-cov>=5",
  "mypy>=1.10",
  "ruff>=0.5",
  "build>=1.2",
]

[project.scripts]
ragapp = "ragapp.cli:main"

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://github.com/deiva/ragapp"
Issues = "https://github.com/deiva/ragapp/issues"

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
addopts = "-q --strict-markers"

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
target-version = "py310"

[tool.mypy]
strict = true
files = ["src"]
snippets.explanation: One file covers build system, project metadata, dev extras, CLI entry point, package discovery, and four tool configs. No `setup.py`, no `setup.cfg`.

snippets.title: Same project with hatchling
snippets.code:
[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[project]
name = "ragapp"
version = "0.1.0"
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = ["numpy>=1.24", "httpx>=0.27"]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = ["pytest>=8", "mypy>=1.10", "ruff>=0.5"]

[project.scripts]
ragapp = "ragapp.cli:main"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["src/ragapp"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
snippets.explanation: Only `[build-system]` and one `[tool.hatch.*]` table change. `[project]` is identical — that's the PEP 621 win.

snippets.title: Dynamic version from package __init__.py
snippets.explanation: Removes the `version = '0.1.0'` line from `[project]`; setuptools imports `ragapp` to read `__version__`. One source of truth, no drift.

snippets.title: Build and inspect distributions
snippets.code:
# build sdist + wheel into dist/
python -m build

# list dist contents to verify what's shipping
ls dist/
unzip -l dist/ragapp-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl

# install from local wheel into a fresh venv to smoke-test
python -m venv /tmp/smoke && /tmp/smoke/bin/pip install dist/ragapp-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl
/tmp/smoke/bin/ragapp --help    # console-script works

# publish to PyPI (test index first!)
twine upload --repository testpypi dist/*
snippets.explanation: The whole publish loop: build → inspect → smoke-install → upload. `pyproject.toml` is the single input.

snippets.title: Editable install + dev extras
snippets.code:
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate

# install package + dev tools in one go
pip install -e ".[dev]"

# now contributors have everything
pytest -q
mypy src
ruff check src
snippets.explanation: `[project.optional-dependencies] dev = [...]` paired with `pip install -e '.[dev]'` gives a one-command contributor setup.
